name: @lizflow/license
description: LizFlow runtime entitlement, lease, and workflow attestation SDK

scripts.release:dry-run: npm test && npm audit --omit=dev && npm publish --dry-run
scripts.release:patch: npm version patch && npm test && npm audit --omit=dev && npm publish && git push origin HEAD --follow-tags
scripts.release:minor: npm version minor && npm test && npm audit --omit=dev && npm publish && git push origin HEAD --follow-tags
scripts.release:major: npm version major && npm test && npm audit --omit=dev && npm publish && git push origin HEAD --follow-tags
